name: Mamidikaya Pappu
steps: Pressure cook toor dal with raw mango pieces, green chillies and turmeric until soft.
Mash to a coarse consistency, add salt and simmer briefly — the mango gives all the sourness needed.
Crackle mustard, cumin, garlic, red chillies and curry leaves in hot oil.
Pour the sizzling tempering over the pappu.
Serve with hot rice and ghee — the classic summer dal of Telugu homes.
